name: NanJing AoLian AE&EA Co.,Ltd
summary: NanJing AoLian AE&EA Co., Ltd. engages in researching, developing, manufacturing, and marketing automobile electronics and electrical accessory products. It provides low-temp starters that include flame preheating devices, grid heaters, PTC, SCR, and glow plugs; AC control panels that comprise electronic, automatic, and manual AC controllers; and accelerator pedals, such as electronic throttles, floor type electronic accelerators, remote electronic throttles, and mechanical electronic accelerators. The company also offers shift levers that include AMT shift handle, MT shift handle, knob type change gear, electric gearshift handle, and AT shift lever assemblies; and other products, which comprises of ATS EGR valve systems, electronic throttles, door and window controllers, and right and left control panels. In addition, it provides transmission controllers, and other electromechanical vehicle accessories, as well as plastic molds. NanJing AoLian AE&EA Co.,Ltd was founded in 2001 and is based in Nanjing, China.
